summary: CEO/Admin delete functionality tested successfully. Backend APIs allow CEO to delete deliveries, customer returns, factory returns, and credit notes regardless of status (not just draft). Frontend correctly shows delete buttons for CEO on all statuses in Returns tab and Stock Out tab (both deliveries and factory returns sections).

context_for_next_testing_agent: CEO/Admin delete functionality is working correctly. Backend endpoints allow CEO to delete: 1) Deliveries (any status except settled), 2) Customer returns (any status), 3) Factory returns (any status), 4) Credit notes (if not applied). Frontend shows delete buttons for CEO on all statuses. The canDelete prop is passed to ReturnsTab and DeliveriesTab components based on user role.
